linting.notes: Makefile provides unified lint target: 'make EXTENSION=odh-jupyter-trash-cleanup lint' runs all linters for an extension. Black requires Python 3.10+ (CI uses 3.10).

testing.run_command: cd odh-jupyter-trash-cleanup && jlpm run test (Jest), cd odh-jupyter-trash-cleanup && pytest -vv -r ap --cov odh_jupyter_trash_cleanup (pytest)
testing.run_single_file: cd odh-jupyter-trash-cleanup && jlpm jest {file} (Jest), cd odh-jupyter-trash-cleanup && pytest {file} (pytest)
testing.run_single_test: cd odh-jupyter-trash-cleanup && jlpm jest -t '{test_name}' (Jest), cd odh-jupyter-trash-cleanup && pytest {file}::{test_name} (pytest)
testing.mock_patterns: pytest fixtures for JupyterLab server configuration
testing.notes: Jest tests are currently placeholder 'todo' tests. Python tests are comprehensive with 6 tests covering trash cleanup functionality. UI tests require Playwright browser installation and are integration tests.

gating_checks.name: Build and test Python
gating_checks.command: cd odh-jupyter-trash-cleanup && python -m pip install .[test] && pytest -vv -r ap --cov odh_jupyter_trash_cleanup

gating_checks.name: Package the extension
gating_checks.command: cd odh-jupyter-trash-cleanup && python -m pip install build && python -m build

gating_checks.name: Integration tests
gating_checks.command: make EXTENSION=odh-jupyter-trash-cleanup ui-tests-setup && make EXTENSION=odh-jupyter-trash-cleanup ui-tests

ci.notes: CI uses Python 3.10 and Node.js (via jupyterlab/maintainer-tools base-setup action). The workflow is triggered on pull_request and push to main. Multiple jobs run: build, test_isolated, integration-tests, and check_links.

build.install_command: jlpm install (root), python -m pip install -U 'jupyterlab>=4.0.0,<5', cd odh-jupyter-trash-cleanup && python -m pip install .[test]
build.build_command: npm run build (dev) or npm run build:prod (production), cd odh-jupyter-trash-cleanup && jlpm build:prod
build.notes: This is a monorepo with workspaces. JupyterLab extensions use jlpm (yarn) for package management. Python package uses hatchling build backend with jupyter-builder hooks for building the labextension.

conventions.import_style: ESM imports, PascalCase for interfaces starting with 'I'
conventions.notes: Single quotes preferred in TypeScript/JavaScript (enforced by prettier/eslint). Black formatting for Python with 79 character line length. Google import order style for Python.

setup_commands: curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash - && apt-get install -y nodejs

lint_commands.notes: Passed with 1 ESLint warning (unused variable). Exit code 0.

test_commands.notes: Passed - 2 todo tests, 0 failures. Exit code 0.

test_commands.command: cd odh-jupyter-trash-cleanup && python -m pip install .[test] && pytest -vv -r ap --cov odh_jupyter_trash_cleanup
test_commands.notes: Passed - 6 tests passed, 87% coverage. Exit code 0.

container_recipe.test_single_file: cd odh-jupyter-trash-cleanup && jlpm jest {file} OR pytest {file}
container_recipe.test_single_test: cd odh-jupyter-trash-cleanup && jlpm jest -t '{name}' OR pytest {file}::{test_name}
container_recipe.notes: Node.js 20.20.1 and Python 3.10.20 validated. jlpm install takes ~20 seconds. All lint and test commands work without additional infrastructure.

results.command: apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl git make gcc g++
results.notes: System dependencies already present in python:3.10 image
